reason: Agent QA-20260515-004548-tg5j successfully received and responded to the test message with the correct answer "4" to the question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Located agent "QA-20260515-004548-tg5j" in the sidebar — Agent was found with "idle" status, visible both in sidebar and main agent list
Clicked on the agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing the agent configuration view with message input field
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator confirmed as "idle" in the top right of the header
Clicked on the message input field — Input field became focused and ready for text entry
Typed the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully entered into the input field
Clicked the Send message button — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created
Waited for agent response — Agent responded within approximately 1 second (well within the 3-minute timeout requirement)
Verified the response mentions "4" — Agent response clearly displays "4" as the answer to the math question, with completion status showing "Worked for 1s"
Took final screenshot — Screenshot 04_final_response.png documents the complete successful interaction with user message and agent response visible
